official_title: Phase 1, Open-Label, Single Center Study of KYV-101, an Autologous Fully-Human Anti-CD19 Chimeric Antigen Receptor T Cell (CD19 CAR T) Therapy, in Participants With Treatment Refractory Progressive Multiple Sclerosis
trial_name: KYV-101 in Refractory Multiple Sclerosis
design: 开放标签、单中心、序贯、非随机
evidence_goal: 验证CD19 CAR-T在神经免疫场景的可行性、深度缓解和安全管理边界。
key_question: MS是否能出现足够清晰的疾病活动下降与长期缓解信号。
watch_points: 长期随访时B细胞重建情况
终点设置是否能支撑后续扩展

official_title: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Phase 3 Trial of Descartes-08 in Patients With Generalized Myasthenia Gravis (MG)
trial_name: AURORA: Descartes-08 in Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
design: 随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心
evidence_goal: 在关键性Phase 3中验证mRNA CAR-T相对安慰剂的疗效、安全性与可操作性。
key_question: AURORA能否确认MG-ADL应答并支撑2027年的注册申报路径。
watch_points: 与标准治疗对照的可解释性

official_title: CD19 CAR T-Cell Therapy in Autoimmune Disease - A Case Series with Follow-up
trial_name: Erlangen-led CD19 CAR-T Autoimmune Case Series
design: 多中心病例系列，最长随访至2年
status: 已发表 / 非单一注册试验
evidence_goal: 证明深度B细胞清除在多类自免疾病中具备跨病种机制潜力。
key_question: 病例系列中的无药缓解和免疫重建信号能否在前瞻性对照研究中复现。

official_title: An Open-Label Clinical Study to Evaluate the Safety and Pharmacodynamics of QH103 Cell Injection in the Treatment of Patients With Relapsed/Refractory Antibody-Mediated Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
trial_name: QH103 in Antibody-Mediated Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
indication: MS / NMOSD / AE / CIDP / MG / MOGAD / IIM
design: 开放标签、单组、3+3剂量递增
evidence_goal: 验证通用型CD19 CAR-γδT在多类抗体介导神经免疫疾病中的安全性、耐受性与药效学。
key_question: 通用型路线能否在控制GVHD、CRS和ICANS的同时形成跨病种可解释信号。
watch_points: 不同神经免疫病种的入组分布

official_title: A Dose Ranging Study to Evaluate the Safety, Tolerance, Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics of Relmacabtagene Autoleucel (Relma-cel) in Patients With Refractory/Progressive Systemic Sclerosis
trial_name: relma-cel in Progressive Systemic Sclerosis
collaborators: Shanghai Ming Ju Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
design: 开放标签、单组、剂量探索
evidence_goal: 把临床改善与蛋白组学变化绑定，提升自免CAR-T机制解释力。
key_question: 是否能从单病种亮点扩展成平台能力证明。

official_title: A Clinical Study Evaluating the Safety and Preliminary Efficacy of Universal Allogeneic CAR T-cell Therapy Targeting CD19 and BCMA in Patients With Relapsed / Refractory Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
trial_name: Universal CD19/BCMA CAR-T in Refractory Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
design: 开放标签、单中心、单组、剂量递增
evidence_goal: 评估通用异体双靶点CD19/BCMA CAR-T在复发难治性神经免疫疾病中的安全性和初步疗效。
key_question: 双靶点通用异体路线能否兼顾深度B细胞/浆细胞清除与可控的CRS、ICANS和异体免疫风险。
watch_points: 90天不良事件与24个月病种量表
不同病种实际入组分布

official_title: A Phase I Study to Evaluate BCMA-targeted Chimeric Antigen Receptor T Cell (SYS6020 Injection) in Patients With Refractory Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
trial_name: SYS6020 in Refractory Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
sponsor: CSPC ZhongQi Pharmaceutical Technology Co., Ltd.
design: 开放标签、非随机、序贯剂量递增与扩展、多中心；不使用清淋，重复给药3次
evidence_goal: 验证LNP-mRNA瞬时转染的自体BCMA CAR-T在难治性全身型MG中的安全性、推荐剂量和初步疗效。
key_question: 无清淋、三次短间隔给药能否在降低持久毒性的同时形成稳定的MG临床应答和自身抗体下降。
watch_points: 无清淋重复给药的可操作性
注册信息更新时间较旧

official_title: A Phase 1 Open-label, Multiregional, Multicenter, Basket Study Evaluating the Safety and Efficacy of KITE-363, an Autologous Anti-CD19/CD20 CAR T-cell Therapy in Participants With Relapsed/Refractory Autoimmune Neurologic Diseases
trial_name: KITE-363 in Autoimmune Neurologic Diseases
design: 开放标签、多区域、多中心、序贯剂量递增与扩展篮式研究
evidence_goal: 验证自体CD19/CD20双靶点CAR-T跨MS、MG和CIDP的安全性、推荐剂量和初步疗效。
key_question: 双靶点能否扩大深度B细胞清除，同时维持可接受的安全性和跨病种终点可解释性。

official_title: A Phase 1, Multicenter, Single-arm, Dose-escalation Study of CC-97540 (BMS-986353), CD19-Targeted NEX-T Chimeric Antigen Receptor (CAR) T Cells, Evaluating Safety and Tolerability in Participants With Autoimmune Neurological Diseases: Relapsing Forms of Multiple Sclerosis (RMS), Progressive Forms of Multiple Sclerosis (PMS), or Refractory Myasthenia Gravis (MG).
trial_name: Breakfree-2: CC-97540 in MS and Refractory MG
sponsor: Juno Therapeutics, Inc., a Bristol-Myers Squibb Company
design: 开放标签、多中心、单组、剂量递增
evidence_goal: 评估NEX-T快速制造CD19 CAR-T在复发型/进展型MS及难治MG中的安全性、药代和初步疗效。
key_question: 较大规模、多地区Phase 1能否建立MS和MG跨队列的一致风险收益信号。

official_title: An Open-label, Multi-center, Phase I/II Study to Assess Safety, Efficacy, and Cellular Kinetics of YTB323 in Participants With Treatment-resistant Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
trial_name: YTB323 in Treatment-resistant Generalized Myasthenia Gravis
design: 开放标签、多中心、单组
evidence_goal: 评估YTB323 CD19 CAR-T在治疗抵抗性全身型MG中的安全性、疗效和细胞动力学。
key_question: 快速制造CD19 CAR-T能否在小型I/II期队列中形成可持续的MG临床改善。
watch_points: 细胞动力学与B细胞重建

official_title: A Phase 1 Dose Evaluation Study of the Safety and Preliminary Efficacy of Anti-CD19 Allogeneic CRISPR-Cas9-Engineered T Cells (CTX112) in Adult Subjects With Refractory Autoimmune Disease
trial_name: CTX112 in Refractory Autoimmune Disease

key_question: 现货型异体产品能否兼顾扩展性、持续性和安全性。

official_title: A Phase 1 Study of FT819 in B-cell Mediated Autoimmune Disease
trial_name: FT819 in B-cell Mediated Autoimmune Disease
design: 开放标签、多中心、多队列、剂量探索

official_title: A Clinical Study Evaluating the Safety and Preliminary Efficacy of Universal Allogeneic CAR T-cell Therapy Targeting CD19 and BCMA（QT-019C） in Patients With Relapsed / Refractory Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
trial_name: QT-019C in Refractory Neurological Autoimmune Diseases

key_question: 项目能否按计划启动并形成可区分证据。

official_title: A Phase 1 Study Evaluating the Safety and Preliminary Efficacy of ALLO-329, a Dual Anti-CD19/Anti-CD70 Allogeneic CAR T Cell Product in Autoimmune Disease
trial_name: ALLO-329 in Autoimmune Disease

official_title: A Phase I Multicohort Trial of Zamtocabtagene Autoleucel (Zamto-Cel) in Subjects With Severe Refractory Autoimmune Diseases
trial_name: Zamto-cel in Severe Refractory Autoimmune Diseases

official_title: A Clinical Study on the Safety and Efficacy of in Vivo CAR-T Cell Therapy (TI-0032-III Injection) for the Treatment of Relapsed and Refractory Autoimmune Diseases

official_title: A Study to Assess the Safety and Preliminary Efficacy of HN2302 in Patients With Autoimmune Diseases

watch_points: 官方后续是否补充更完整产品描述

official_title: A Phase 1 Study of Anitocabtagene Autoleucel for the Treatment of Subjects With Non-oncology Plasma Cell-related Diseases

official_title: Clinical Study on the Safety and Efficacy of Targeted BCMA In Vivo LV Injection in the Treatment of Recurrent or Refractory Autoimmune Diseases

official_title: A Single-center Clinical Study Evaluating the Safety and Efficacy of Universal CD19-targeting CAR-γδT Cells（QH103） in Refractory Autoimmune Diseases

official_title: An Open-Label, Phase I Study to Evaluate the Safety, Tolerability, Pharmacokinetics, and Pharmacodynamics of Allogeneic CAR-T Cell Therapy (OL-108) in the Treatment of Relapsed/Refractory Autoimmune Diseases
trial_name: OL-108 in Relapsed/Refractory Autoimmune Diseases

official_title: An Open, Single-Arm, Single-Center Clinical Study Assessing the Safety and Efficacy of BCMA-CD19 Targeted Chimeric Antigen Receptor T-Cell Therapy in Multiple Refractory Autoimmune Diseases

official_title: RESET-MG: A Phase 1/2, Open-Label Study to Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of Autologous CD19-specific Chimeric Antigen Receptor T Cells (CABA-201) in Participants With Generalized Myasthenia Gravis

indication: RA / SLE / Sjogren disease / SSc / IIM
design: 开放标签、单中心、单次输注
evidence_goal: 评估院内制备自体CD19 CAR-T在系统性风湿自身免疫病中的早期安全性与初步疗效可行性。
key_question: 小样本单中心院内CAR-T能否在不扩大不可接受毒性的前提下形成后续扩展依据。
watch_points: 单中心生产与放行可复制性
后续是否扩展到更大人群

official_title: An Open Label Clinical Trial to Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of CT103A Cells for the Treatment of Relapsed/Refractory Antibody-associated Inflammatory Diseases of the Nervous System
trial_name: CT103A in Antibody-associated Inflammatory Diseases of the Nervous System
indication: NMOSD / MG / CIDP / IIM / MS / AE / MOGAD / POEMS
design: 开放标签、单中心、单组；FLU/CY清淋后单次输注
evidence_goal: 评估BCMA CAR-T CT103A在抗体介导神经免疫疾病中的安全性、药效学和初步疗效。
key_question: 通过清除BCMA阳性的浆细胞，CT103A能否在NMOSD、MG、MS和AE等病种间形成可比较且可持续的自身抗体下降与临床缓解。
watch_points: 致病抗体滴度和可溶性BCMA变化
MS患者NfL变化与神经系统安全性
VCN与CAR-T持续时间的长期随访

official_title: Treatment of Refractory Immune Thrombocytopenia
trial_name: BCMA-CD19 cCAR T in Refractory Immune Thrombocytopenia
indication: refractory immune thrombocytopenia associated with autoimmune disease
design: 开放标签、单臂
evidence_goal: 评估BCMA-CD19 cCAR T在合并自身免疫背景的难治性免疫性血小板减少中的安全性和缓解率。
key_question: 双靶点B细胞/浆细胞清除能否在ITP场景中复制SLE样的深度免疫重置，同时保持可接受毒性。

official_title: Phase I, IIa, Single-Arm, Study of BCMA-CD19-IL-15/IL15sushi cCAR T for the Treatment of Refractory Systemic Lupus Erythematosus, With or Without Lupus Nephritis
trial_name: ICG318 in Refractory SLE With or Without Lupus Nephritis
design: 开放标签、单臂、剂量递增；单纯环磷酰胺清淋
evidence_goal: 评估ICG318在难治性SLE/LN中的安全性、DORIS缓解率和RP2D。
key_question: 在已有扩展随访信号基础上，装甲型BCMA/CD19 CAR-T能否在前瞻性Phase 1/2中复制药物停用缓解与肾脏获益。
watch_points: B细胞清除与naive B细胞恢复

official_title: Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of CD19-BCMA Targeted CAR-T Therapy for Refractory, Generalized Myasthenia Gravis: A Single-center, Open-label, Single-arm, Dose-finding Study
trial_name: Tangdu CD19/BCMA CAR-T in Refractory gMG
design: IIT；单中心、开放标签、单臂、剂量探索
evidence_goal: 验证CD19/BCMA双靶点CAR-T在难治gMG中的剂量、安全性与初步疗效。
key_question: 单细胞免疫重置信号能否在完整队列中转化为稳定的MG-ADL和QMG改善？

official_title: Clinical Study on the Safety, Efficacy, and Pharmacokinetics of Universal CAR-T Cell Injection Targeting CD19/BCMA in Patients With Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
trial_name: RD06-05 UCAR-T in Neurological Autoimmune Diseases
design: IIT；单中心、开放标签、多病种篮式、单臂
evidence_goal: 评估通用CD19/BCMA CAR-T在四类神经自身免疫病中的安全性、PK/PD与初步疗效。
key_question: 通用双靶点产品能否在不同神经免疫病种中保持可控安全性和一致免疫重置？
watch_points: 异体细胞持续性与免疫原性

official_title: Anti-BCMA/CD19 CAR T cell therapy in patients with refractory generalized myasthenia gravis: a single-arm, phase 1 trial
trial_name: Xuzhou BCMA/CD19 CAR-T Phase 1 in Refractory gMG
design: IIT；单中心、单臂、剂量递增I期
evidence_goal: 评估双靶点CAR-T的安全性、剂量与难治gMG临床改善。
key_question: 18例单臂结果能否在更大、对照性研究中复现？
watch_points: 停激素与停免疫抑制持续性
长期感染和低丙球风险

official_title: A Phase 1/2, Open-Label Study to Evaluate the Safety and Efficacy of Autologous CD19-specific Chimeric Antigen Receptor T Cells (CABA-201) in Subjects With Active Idiopathic Inflammatory Myopathy or Juvenile Idiopathic Inflammatory Myopathy
trial_name: RESET-Myositis：rese-cel治疗成人及青少年IIM
indication: Dermatomyositis / Antisynthetase syndrome / IMNM / Juvenile IIM
design: 开放标签、非随机、多队列；含成人DM/ASyS/IMNM、青少年IIM及Phase 2b子研究
evidence_goal: 验证rese-cel在不同IIM亚型中的TIS、肌力、多器官获益和持续性，并支持注册导向开发。
key_question: 单臂注册路径能否以标准化TIS和激素停用形成足够稳健的效应量。

en.trial_name: RESET-Myositis: rese-cel in adult and juvenile IIM
en.design: Open-label, non-randomized, multi-cohort design covering adult DM/ASyS/IMNM, juvenile IIM, and Phase 2b substudies
en.evidence_goal: Evaluate TIS, strength, multi-organ benefit, and durability across IIM subtypes to support registration-oriented development.
en.key_question: Can a single-arm registration path generate a robust effect size using standardized TIS and steroid withdrawal?
watch_points: Consistency across DM, ASyS, and IMNM

official_title: A Phase 2, Randomized, Open-label, Controlled Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Rapcabtagene Autoleucel Versus Comparator in Participants With Severe Refractory Idiopathic Inflammatory Myopathies (IIM)
trial_name: YTB323对比标准治疗的随机Phase 2 IIM研究
design: 随机、开放标签、平行对照；对照为研究者选择的他克莫司、MMF、环磷酰胺或利妥昔单抗
evidence_goal: 以主动对照评估YTB323在重症难治IIM中的相对疗效和安全性。
key_question: 小规模随机主动对照能否显示超越现有免疫抑制策略的临床效应。

en.trial_name: Randomized Phase 2 YTB323 versus standard therapy in IIM
en.design: Randomized, open-label, parallel active control using investigator choice of tacrolimus, MMF, cyclophosphamide, or rituximab
en.evidence_goal: Assess comparative efficacy and safety of YTB323 in severe refractory IIM against active standard therapy.
en.key_question: Can a small randomized active-control study show clinical benefit beyond existing immunosuppression?
watch_points: Baseline balance in the 21-patient randomized cohort

official_title: A Randomized Double-Blind Placebo-Controlled Study to Evaluate Efficacy, Safety, and Tolerability of Descartes-08 in Patients With Dermatomyositis and Antisynthetase Syndrome
trial_name: Descartes-08治疗自身抗体介导肌炎的随机Phase 2研究
design: 随机、双盲、安慰剂对照；BCMA mRNA CAR-T，无清淋重复给药路线
evidence_goal: 验证无清淋、非持久表达BCMA CAR-T在DM和ASyS中的疗效、安全性与执行优势。
key_question: MG中建立的重复给药平台能否在肌炎和肺部受累中形成可重复的临床优势。

en.trial_name: Randomized Phase 2 Descartes-08 in autoantibody-mediated myositis
en.design: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, lymphodepletion-free repeat-dose BCMA mRNA CAR-T
en.evidence_goal: Test efficacy, safety, and operational advantages of transient BCMA CAR-T in DM and ASyS without lymphodepletion.
en.key_question: Can the repeat-dose platform established in MG create reproducible benefit in myositis and lung involvement?
watch_points: Lung function, TIS, and antibody change
